content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Painting Fence". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/448/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of posts. The second line contains n integers representing the color of each post.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of segments to paint the fence.

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to keep track of the minimum number of segments for each post.
